transactions.desc: Palmquist was designated for assignment by the Rockies on Thursday.
Stevens had his contract selected from Triple-A Albuquerque, and he is starting Thursday's contest at second base against the Diamondbacks.
Peralta was optioned to Triple-A Albuquerque on Thursday.
Castano was called up from Triple-A Albuquerque on Thursday.
The Red Sox optioned Zack Kelly to Triple-A Worcester on Thursday, Chris Cotillo of MassLive.com reports.
The Pirates optioned Cook to Triple-A Indianapolis on Thursday, Jose Negron of DK Pittsburgh Sports reports.
The Pirates recalled Valdez from Triple-A Indianapolis on Thursday, Francys Romero of BeisbolFR.com reports.
The Cincinnati Reds traded OF Rece Hinds to the Miami Marlins.
The Miami Marlins traded RHP Zach McCambley to the Cincinnati Reds.
Atlanta claimed Handley off waivers from the Orioles on Thursday and optioned him to Triple-A Gwinnett.
The Astros optioned Murray to Triple-A Sugar Land on Thursday, reports Brian McTaggart of MLB.com.
The Marlins recalled Pauley from Triple-A Jacksonville on Thursday, Barry Jackson of the Miami Herald reports.
Curry will be promoted from High-A Hub City to Double-A Frisco on Thursday, Ari Alexander of 7 News Boston reports
Atlanta optioned Mederos to Triple-A Gwinnett on Thursday.
Atlanta selected Carrasco's contract from Triple-A Gwinnett on Thursday.
The Nationals activated Beeter (forearm) from the 15-day injured list Thursday.
The Nationals optioned Poulin to Triple-A Rochester on Wednesday, Mark Zuckerman of NatsJournal.com reports.
The Angels outrighted Manoah to Triple-A Salt Lake on Wednesday.
The Angels optioned Johnson to Double-A Rocket City following Tuesday's 14-6 loss to the Athletics.
The Angels recalled Saucedo from Triple-A Salt Lake on Wednesday.
The Rockies designated Crim for assignment Wednesday.
The Rockies selected Thompson's contract from Triple-A Albuquerque on Wednesday.
The Mets selected Thornton's contract from Triple-A Syracuse ahead of his scheduled start Wednesday in Washington.
The Mets optioned Duarte to Triple-A Syracuse on Wednesday.
Atlanta designated Azocar for assignment Wednesday.
The Marlins optioned Garrett to Triple-A Jacksonville on Wednesday.
Atlanta activated White from the 7-day concussion injured list Wednesday.
The Rangers activated Curvelo (shoulder) from the 15-day injured list Wednesday and optioned him to Triple-A Round Rock.
The Mariners optioned Ortiz to Triple-A Tacoma on Wednesday.
The Mariners reinstated Brash (lat) from the 15-day injured list Wednesday.
